targets.sourceTitle: What generative AI tools should I allow or encourage my students to use?
Generative AI | City University of Hong Kong
Microsoft Copilot for Enterprise: Now Available for All Staff and Students
Generative Artificial Intelligence (Gen AI) - University of Auckland
UC San Diego's Support of AI
Generative AI in Teaching and Learning: Tools
AI Apps | Enterprise GenAI | Office of the Chief Information Officer

stopConditions: Only source-backed tool-level records are staged.
Broad AI guidance is not expanded into named tool conclusions.
Nested model-family mentions inside institution-hosted platforms are not promoted unless presented as separate tools.

methodsAttempted.query: site:bristol.ac.uk University of Bristol generative AI tools approved AI tools Copilot ChatGPT
methodsAttempted.notes: Official BILT guidance page identified a recommended Microsoft Copilot path.

artifacts.summary: Official Bristol teaching guidance provided tool-level evidence for Microsoft Copilot; broad public LLM examples were not promoted.

methodsAttempted.query: site:lse.ac.uk LSE generative AI tools approved AI tools Copilot ChatGPT Edu
methodsAttempted.notes: Official Digital Skills Lab page listed Claude and Copilot access.

artifacts.summary: Official LSE page provided tool-level evidence for Claude and Microsoft Copilot.

methodsAttempted.query: site:cityu.edu.hk CityUHK generative AI tools approved AI chatbot Copilot ChatGPT
methodsAttempted.notes: Official GenAI and IT Services pages identified CityUHK Chatbot and Microsoft Copilot services.

artifacts.summary: CityUHK official sources provided records for a university-hosted chatbot and Microsoft Copilot services; nested model-family mentions were not promoted.

methodsAttempted.query: site:auckland.ac.nz University of Auckland generative AI tools approved Copilot ChatGPT AI tools
methodsAttempted.notes: Official student tools page listed approved generative AI tools.

artifacts.summary: University of Auckland official source provided records for Microsoft 365 Copilot Chat, Google Gemini, and NotebookLM.

methodsAttempted.query: site:ucsd.edu UC San Diego generative AI tools approved ChatGPT Edu Copilot AI tools
methodsAttempted.notes: Official Blink AI services page and Google service page listed supported tools.

artifacts.summary: UCSD official sources provided records for TritonGPT, Zoom AI Companion, Microsoft Copilot services, Google Gemini, and NotebookLM.

methodsAttempted.query: site:utexas.edu University of Texas Austin AI tools approved generative AI Copilot ChatGPT
methodsAttempted.notes: Official UT Libraries and FISD pages listed UT-licensed and UT-hosted tools.

artifacts.summary: UT Austin official sources provided records for licensed commercial tools and UT-hosted platforms UT Sage and UT Spark.

methodsAttempted.query: site:illinois.edu OR site:uiuc.edu University of Illinois Urbana Champaign AI tools approved generative AI Copilot ChatGPT
methodsAttempted.notes: Official Enterprise GenAI AI Apps page listed AI app records.

artifacts.summary: UIUC official Enterprise GenAI page provided a tool directory with app-level records.

artifacts.title: QS 61-70 AI tools extraction
artifacts.summary: AI tools staging extraction for QS row-level continuation, including prior gaps for Bristol and LSE plus QS rows 63-70 where official tool-level evidence was found.
limitations: Tool-level records are derived from official source-backed text and are not official university conclusions.
Broad AI guidance and nested model-family mentions were not expanded into named tool availability records.
No legal, academic-integrity, privacy, or procurement advice is provided.
